title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Emeritus Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Emeritus Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Emeritus Global Group in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Emeritus Global Group:
Emeritus Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus Global Group!
